Compute the components affected by a change.

Reads the object-model catalog (its ownership map and dependency graph),
classifies the change between --base and --head (or an explicit --files list),
and reports the affected component set with a confidence signal. This is the
same engine 'orun plan/run --changed' and the cockpit use.

  directlyChanged  components whose own inputs changed
  dependents       components that transitively depend on a changed one
  affected         the cockpit "blast radius" (directlyChanged + dependents)
  selection        the plan/run job set (directlyChanged + include:always deps)

On classification ambiguity the engine over-reports (never under). A component.yaml
edit lowers confidence and sets needsFullResolve.

Examples:
  orun catalog affected
  orun catalog affected --base main --head HEAD
  orun catalog affected --files apps/api/main.go --json
  orun catalog affected --files packages/policy-engine/src/index.ts --explain

Usage:
  orun catalog affected [flags]

Flags:
      --base string            Base ref for change detection (default: main)
      --explain                Show why each component was selected (file, intent, or build-input provenance)
      --files strings          Comma-separated changed files (bypasses git diff)
      --head string            Head ref for change detection (default: working tree)
      --intent-impact string   How global intent changes affect components (all/watch/none) (default "watch")
      --json                   Emit the CatalogAffectedResult JSON envelope

Global Flags:
      --all                 Disable CWD-based component scoping; process all components
  -c, --config-dir string   Config directory for JobRegistry definitions (or set ORUN_CONFIG_DIR; use * or ** for recursive scanning)
  -i, --intent string       Intent file path (auto-discovered if not set) (default "intent.yaml")
